<script>
	import { onMount } from 'svelte'
	let { iconMap = $bindable({}) } = $props()
	let modal1 = $state()

	const open = () => {
		console.log('toggle')

		if (modal1) {
			modal1.showModal()
		}
	}
	const extractIconMap = () => {
		const symbols = document.querySelectorAll('#sprite-1 symbol')
		const iconArr = []
		symbols.forEach((symbol, id) => {
			const icon = symbol.id
			const [group, name] = icon.split(/-(.+)/)
			iconArr.push({ id, group, name, icon })
		})

		return iconArr
	}

	onMount(() => {
		iconMap = extractIconMap()
		console.log('available icons', iconMap.map((d) => d.icon).join(','))
		console.log(Object.keys(iconMap[0]).join(', '))
		console.log(iconMap)
	})
</script>

<!-- prettier-ignore -->
<svg id="sprite-1" style="position: absolute; width: 0; height: 0; overflow: hidden;"><defs>
	
	{@render icon1()}{@render icon2()}{@render icon3()}{@render icon4()}
</defs></svg>
<!-- /* ------------------------------- PKMN Icons ------------------------------- */ -->

	<!-- prettier-ignore -->
